calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:25am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Appellant, Annie Strausz appears in Pro Per; Respondents, Adrea Bustamante & Kystyna Milewski, appear in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, present their case in the narrative in response to questions from Judge Fleisig.
EXHR(1) Copy of lease
EXHR(2) 9/29/06 & 10/17/06 correspondence
EXHR(3) Copies of emails from Ms. Strusz to respondents
EXHR(4) copies of cancelled checks and other expenses
EXHA(A) 10/9/06 correspondence
11:02am
Matter is submitted, evidence is retained. Exhibit #3 was not returned to the clerk after the hearing.(Respondent's evidence is returned to Andrea Bustamanate and Krystyna Milewski in one envelope.)
